mapper.select: SELECT bd.material_id AS materialId, -- 자재 ID m.material_name AS materialName, -- 자재명(표시용) m.unit AS unit, -- 기본 단위(kg, EA 등) SUM(bd.qty * #{orderQty}) AS gross_req -- 총소요량 = (BOM 수량 × 주문수량) FROM bom_master bm JOIN bom_detail bd ON bd.bom_id = bm.bom_id LEFT JOIN material m ON m.material_id = bd.material_id WHERE bm.product_id = #{productId} AND bm.status = 'ACTIVE' -- 활성 BOM만 전개 GROUP BY bd.material_id, m.material_name, m.unit ORDER BY materialId

SELECT g.materialId AS materialId, -- 자재ID m.material_name AS materialName, -- 자재명(표시용) m.unit AS unit, -- 단위 g.gross_req AS gross_req, -- 총소요 IFNULL(inv.on_hand, 0) AS on_hand, -- 재고합계 IFNULL(rsv.reserved, 0) AS reserved, -- 예약합계 (IFNULL(inv.on_hand, 0) - IFNULL(rsv.reserved, 0)) AS available, -- 가용 GREATEST(g.gross_req - (IFNULL(inv.on_hand,0) - IFNULL(rsv.reserved,0)), 0) AS net_req -- 순소요(최소 0) FROM ( /* 1) BOM 전개 → 총소요 */ SELECT bd.material_id AS materialId, SUM(bd.qty * #{orderQty}) AS gross_req FROM bom_master bm JOIN bom_detail bd ON bd.bom_id = bm.bom_id WHERE bm.product_id = #{productId} AND bm.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY bd.material_id ) g /* 2) 자재 마스터(표시용 정보) */ LEFT JOIN material m ON m.material_id = g.materialId /* 3) 재고합계(on_hand): LOT/창고 행을 자재별로 집계 */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT material_id, SUM(quantity) AS on_hand FROM material_inventory GROUP BY material_id ) inv ON inv.material_id = g.materialId /* 4) 예약합계(reserved): WO×자재 예약을 자재별로 집계 */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT material_id, SUM(reserved_qty) AS reserved FROM material_reservation GROUP BY material_id ) rsv ON rsv.material_id = g.materialId ORDER BY net_req DESC, materialId

WITH gross AS ( SELECT bd.material_id AS materialId, SUM(bd.qty * #{orderQty}) AS gross_req FROM bom_master bm JOIN bom_detail bd ON bd.bom_id = bm.bom_id WHERE bm.product_id = #{productId} AND bm.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY bd.material_id ), inv AS ( SELECT material_id, SUM(quantity) AS on_hand FROM material_inventory GROUP BY material_id ), rsv AS ( SELECT material_id, SUM(reserved_qty) AS reserved FROM material_reservation GROUP BY material_id ) SELECT g.materialId AS materialId, m.material_name AS materialName, m.unit AS unit, g.gross_req AS gross_req, IFNULL(inv.on_hand, 0) AS on_hand, IFNULL(rsv.reserved, 0) AS reserved, (IFNULL(inv.on_hand, 0) - IFNULL(rsv.reserved, 0)) AS available, GREATEST(g.gross_req - (IFNULL(inv.on_hand,0) - IFNULL(rsv.reserved,0)), 0) AS net_req FROM gross g LEFT JOIN material m ON m.material_id = g.materialId LEFT JOIN inv ON inv.material_id = g.materialId LEFT JOIN rsv ON rsv.material_id = g.materialId WHERE GREATEST(g.gross_req - (IFNULL(inv.on_hand,0) - IFNULL(rsv.reserved,0)), 0) > 0 ORDER BY net_req DESC, materialId;

WITH gross AS ( SELECT bd.material_id AS materialId, SUM(bd.qty * #{orderQty}) AS gross_req FROM bom_master bm JOIN bom_detail bd ON bd.bom_id = bm.bom_id WHERE bm.product_id = #{productId} AND bm.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY bd.material_id ), inv AS ( SELECT material_id, SUM(quantity) AS on_hand FROM material_inventory GROUP BY material_id ), rsv AS ( SELECT material_id, SUM(reserved_qty) AS reserved FROM material_reservation GROUP BY material_id ), need AS ( /* net_req > 0 인 자재만 */ SELECT g.materialId, m.material_name AS materialName, m.unit AS unit, g.gross_req, IFNULL(inv.on_hand,0) AS on_hand, IFNULL(rsv.reserved,0) AS reserved, (IFNULL(inv.on_hand,0) - IFNULL(rsv.reserved,0)) AS available, GREATEST(g.gross_req - (IFNULL(inv.on_hand,0) - IFNULL(rsv.reserved,0)), 0) AS net_req FROM gross g LEFT JOIN material m ON m.material_id = g.materialId LEFT JOIN inv ON inv.material_id = g.materialId LEFT JOIN rsv ON rsv.material_id = g.materialId WHERE GREATEST(g.gross_req - (IFNULL(inv.on_hand,0) - IFNULL(rsv.reserved,0)), 0) > 0 ), cand AS ( /* 공급사 후보 + 우선순위(리드타임, 단가) 부여 */ SELECT si.material_id, si.supplier_id, si.unit_price, si.lead_days, /* 공급 가능(Y)만 우선. 컬럼이 없으면 조건 제거 가능 */ CASE WHEN IFNULL(si.supply_available,'Y') = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS available_rank FROM supplier_item si ), ranked AS ( SELECT n.materialId, n.materialName, n.unit, n.net_req, c.supplier_id, c.unit_price, c.lead_days, ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY n.materialId ORDER BY c.available_rank ASC, c.lead_days ASC, c.unit_price ASC, c.supplier_id ASC ) AS rn FROM need n LEFT JOIN cand c ON c.material_id = n.materialId ) SELECT r.materialId, r.materialName, r.unit, r.net_req, -- 부족수량 /* 계획 발주수량: MOQ/LOT 없으면 net_req 그대로 */ r.net_req AS planned_qty, r.supplier_id AS supplier_id, r.unit_price AS unit_price, r.lead_days AS lead_days, DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL IFNULL(CEIL(r.lead_days), 3) DAY) AS expected_inbound_date, (r.net_req * IFNULL(r.unit_price,0)) AS total_cost, /* 상태: 공급사 없으면 NO_SUPPLIER */ CASE WHEN r.supplier_id IS NULL THEN 'NO_SUPPLIER' ELSE 'OK' END AS plan_status FROM ranked r WHERE r.rn = 1 -- 자재별 1순위 공급사만 선택 ORDER BY plan_status DESC, r.materialId;

SELECT CONCAT( 'PO-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-', LPAD( COALESCE( MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(order_id, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)), 0 ) + 1, 3, '0' ) ) FROM material_order WHERE order_id LIKE CONCAT('PO-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-%')
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO material_order_item ( order_id, material_id, quantity, unit_price, expected_inbound_date ) VALUES
(#{orderId}, #{it.materialId}, #{it.qty}, #{it.unitPrice}, #{it.expectedInboundDate})
